controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction- reserve bank of india (call, notice and term money markets) directions, 2021
controls.control_description:
(a) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction- Reserve Bank of India
(Call, Notice and Term Money Markets) Directions, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction- reserve bank of india (call, notice and term money markets) directions, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with effect from april 05, 2021
controls.control_description: (b) These Directions shall come into force with effect from April 05, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with effect from april 05, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure a banking company (including a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 or a "
controls.control_description:
(i) "Bank" means a banking company (including a Payment Bank and a
Small Finance Bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 or a "regional rural bank", a "corresponding new
bank" or "State Bank of India" as defined in clauses (ja), (da) and (nc),
of section 5 respectively thereof, or a "cooperative bank" as defined in
clause (cci) of section 5 read with section 56 of the said Act;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a banking company (including a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 or a "

controls.control_objective: To ensure borrowing or lending in unsecured funds on overnight basis
controls.control_description:
(ii) "Call Money" means borrowing or lending in unsecured funds on
overnight basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to borrowing or lending in unsecured funds on overnight basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned in the applicable capital regulations issued by the department of regulation of the <image> reserve bank as amended from tim
controls.control_description:
(iii) "Capital Funds" shall have the meaning assigned in the applicable
capital regulations issued by the Department of Regulation of the
<image>
Reserve Bank as amended from time to time and shall be calculated
as per the latest audited balance sheet;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned in the applicable capital regulations issued by the department of regulation of the <image> reserve bank as amended from tim

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned in paragraph 2 (1) (iii) of the electronic trading platform (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018, as modif
controls.control_description:
(iv) "Electronic Trading Platform" or "ETP" shall have the meaning
assigned in paragraph 2 (1) (iii) of the Electronic Trading Platform
(Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018 dated October 05, 2018, as modified
from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned in paragraph 2 (1) (iii) of the electronic trading platform (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018, as modif

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean 'recognised stock exchange' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to in section 2 (f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956
controls.control_description:
(v) "Exchange" shall mean 'recognised stock exchange' and shall have
the same meaning as assigned to in Section 2 (f) of the Securities
Contract Regulation Act, 1956.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean 'recognised stock exchange' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to in section 2 (f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under section 42 of the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(vi) "Fortnight" shall have the meaning assigned to it under section 42 of
the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under section 42 of the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under the
controls.control_description: (viii) "Net Owned Fund" shall have the meaning assigned to it under the
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to participate in the call, notice and term money markets, both as borrowers and lenders:
controls.control_description:
Participants
The following entities shall be eligible to participate in the Call, Notice and Term
Money Markets, both as borrowers and lenders:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to participate in the call, notice and term money markets, both as borrowers and lenders:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the participants with the approval of their board within the regulatory framework of the exposure norms prescribed by the department of
controls.control_description:
(a) Prudential limits in respect of outstanding lending transactions in the Call,
Notice and Term Money Markets shall be decided by the participants with the
approval of their Board within the regulatory framework of the exposure norms
prescribed by the Department of Regulation of the Reserve Bank for the eligible
participant concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be decided by the participants with the approval of their board within the regulatory framework of the exposure norms prescribed by the department of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be executed in over-the-counter markets, including on the nds-call platform or any other electronic trading platform authorised for the purpose by the
controls.control_description:
(b) Trading venues: Call, Notice and Term Money transactions shall be executed
in Over-the-Counter markets, including on the NDS-CALL platform or any other
Electronic Trading Platform authorised for the purpose by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be executed in over-the-counter markets, including on the nds-call platform or any other electronic trading platform authorised for the purpose by the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be from 9:00 am to 5:00 pm on each business day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(c) Market timings: The market timings for Call, Notice and Term Money
transactions shall be from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on each business day or as
specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be from 9:00 am to 5:00 pm on each business day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the standard market practices, methodologies and documentation prescribed by fixed income money market and derivatives association of india (fi
controls.control_description:
(d) Market practices and documentation: Eligible participants shall follow the
standard market practices, methodologies and documentation prescribed by
Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India (FIMMDA), in
consultation with the Reserve Bank, from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the standard market practices, methodologies and documentation prescribed by fixed income money market and derivatives association of india (fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure , normally, not be cancelled
controls.control_description: (a) A Call, Notice or Term Money transaction shall, normally, not be cancelled.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , normally, not be cancelled

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported as set out in paragraph 7 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(c) Any cancellation or termination of a Call, Notice or Term Money transaction
shall be reported as set out in paragraph 7 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported as set out in paragraph 7 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the nds-call platform within 15 minutes of execution (the time when interest rate is agreed), by both counterparties to the transaction
controls.control_description:
(a) All Call, Notice or Term Money transactions, other than those executed on NDS-
CALL platform, shall be reported to the NDS-CALL platform within 15 minutes
of execution (the time when interest rate is agreed), by both counterparties to
the transaction or by the Electronic Trading Platform concerned, as the case
may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the nds-call platform within 15 minutes of execution (the time when interest rate is agreed), by both counterparties to the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain membership of nds-call platform
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, all eligible participants in the Call, Notice and Term
Money Markets shall obtain membership of NDS-CALL platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain membership of nds-call platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain such membership within a period of six months from the date of these directions
controls.control_description:
Eligible
participants who are not members of NDS-CALL platform shall obtain such
membership within a period of six months from the date of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain such membership within a period of six months from the date of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported on the nds-call platform within 15 minutes of cancellation by each counterparty to the transaction or by the electronic trading platform c
controls.control_description:
(c) Any cancellation or termination of a Call, Notice and Term Money transaction
shall be reported on the NDS-CALL platform within 15 minutes of cancellation
by each counterparty to the transaction or by the Electronic Trading Platform
concerned, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported on the nds-call platform within 15 minutes of cancellation by each counterparty to the transaction or by the electronic trading platform c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately brought to the notice of the clearcorp dealing system ltd
controls.control_description:
(d) Any misreporting or multiple reporting of the same OTC markets deal by a
counterparty shall be immediately brought to the notice of the Clearcorp Dealing
System Ltd., or any other NDS-CALL system operator authorised by the
Reserve Bank and also to the Financial Markets Regulation Department,
Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai, through email.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately brought to the notice of the clearcorp dealing system ltd

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such information, statement or clarification
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank: The Reserve
Bank may call for any information or statement or seek any clarification, which in the
opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from persons or agencies dealing in the Call,
Notice and Term Money Markets, including eligible participants, and such persons,
agencies and participants shall furnish such information, statement or clarification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such information, statement or clarification

controls.control_objective: To ensure publish any anonymised data related to transactions in call, notice and term money markets
controls.control_description:
Dissemination of data: The Reserve Bank or any other person authorised by the
Reserve Bank, may publish any anonymised data related to transactions in Call,
Notice and Term Money Markets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to publish any anonymised data related to transactions in call, notice and term money markets

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the call, notice and ter
controls.control_description:
Violation of Directions: In the event of any person or agency violating any
provision of these Directions or the provisions of any other applicable law, the Reserve
Bank may, in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with
law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the Call, Notice and Term Money
<image>
Markets for a period not exceeding one month at a time, after providing reasonable
opportunity to the person or agency to defend its actions, and such action may be
made public by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the call, notice and ter

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to call, notice and term money transactions entered into from the date these directions come into force
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to Call, Notice and Term Money transactions entered
into from the date these Directions come into force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to call, notice and term money transactions entered into from the date these directions come into force

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable to transactions undertaken in accordance with the said directions till the expiry of those contracts
controls.control_description:
FMRD.DIRD.01/14.01.001/2020-21 dated December 04, 2020, shall continue to be
applicable to transactions undertaken in accordance with the said Directions till the
expiry of those contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be applicable to transactions undertaken in accordance with the said directions till the expiry of those contracts
